历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Chongqing University in Hebei Province's Physics Category were approximately 6814 → 7470 → 9678 → 10308 → 11635, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4821 positions over the past 4 years, averaging about 1205 positions per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11635; the enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hebei Province was 138 in 2021, 137 in 2022, 137 in 2023, 137 in 2024, and 140 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 147, an increase of 7 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 5%), which alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science University Rankings, it ranked 34th in 2021, 34th in 2022, 34th in 2023, 33rd in 2024, 34th in 2025, and 34th in 2026, with stable rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident raising campus safety concerns; Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; no obvious admission gaps have been recorded, overall application attention is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering received A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities; advantageous disciplines such as Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering are highly matched with the Physics Category enrollment majors in Hebei Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chongqing University is located in Chongqing City, in the southwestern region, which is an inter-provincial study option for Hebei Province candidates; the proportion of Hebei Province in the university's total national enrollment is about 3% (2025), not a major source province, so regional preference factors have limited impact; majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly aligned with Chongqing University's Engineering Experimental Class broad enrollment direction, with strong appeal of popular majors; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 college entrance examination in Hebei Province is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (about 606,754), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 365,000 based on historical proportions, leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 5% expansion in the Physics Category in 2026 providing some relief to competition, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, taking into account the combined effects of candidate scale expansion and the appeal of popular majors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 12014, with a range of 11514–12514.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 12014, with a range of 11514–12514. If the ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower end of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Popular engineering experimental classes such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science are highly competitive; it is suggested to combine personal interests with the advantages of discipline evaluations for a reasonable mix.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Chongqing University in Hebei Province's History Category were approximately 925 → 1087 → 1633 → 988 → 1075, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable decline, followed by a substantial recovery in 2024, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 1075. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 12 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 34th in the Soft Science ranking, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, and the laboratory safety incident may have a mild suppressive effect on overall application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-to-high level. Advantageous disciplines such as Civil Engineering (A+), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Electrical Engineering (A-) are mainly engineering-oriented. The History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law and Journalism) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, and the appeal of discipline evaluations is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Law major is divided and wait-and-see, while the Chinese Language and Literature major is relatively hot and recommended. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination registrants is approximately 609,800, with History Category candidates estimated at about 245,000 based on historical proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (about 244,000). Chongqing University is located in Chongqing City, which is an out-of-province study destination for Hebei History Category candidates, with limited regional preference influence. The university's History Category enrollment in Hebei Province is small (8 students), and the enrollment scale is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large historical ranking fluctuations but recent stabilization, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight increase in Hebei History Category candidate numbers, and divided popularity of liberal arts majors, and taking into account the comprehensive impact of a slight increase in candidate scale and slightly negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1090, with a range of 837–1343.
